title: Increased Wither Skeleton Skull Chance
description: A datapack/mod to increase the drop chance for wither skeleton skulls.
body:
# Increased Wither Skeleton Skull Chance

A simple datapack/mod to increase the drop chance of wither skeleton skulls to 10%.  
Each level of looting gives a 5% increase.

## Installation

The datapack/mod has been tested on 1.20 to 1.20.5 but it is so simple I expect it to work on many other version as well.

You can add it to your profile directly from Modrinth.

I recommend using [Paxi](https://modrinth.com/mod/paxi) to manage datapacks per profile instead of per world.

## Permissions

Feel free to include this in any modpack, as long as it stays within the Modrinth ecosystem.
